default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review new EM training modules and gather feedback for future development.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Training Platform:** Marisol demoed a new training platform with foundational modules and "master documents" (week-by-week, meeting-first) designed for on-demand, job-specific learning, not linear consumption.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [**Top Priority: Standardized Reporting:** The team's top request is a standardized reporting framework to tell a consistent, data-driven story of impact, moving beyond reactive "taskmaster" work.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [**Critical Handoff Gaps:** The transition from Strategy Sprint to Phase 2 is a major pain point due to unclear KPIs, inconsistent documentation, and a "recalibration period" where initial high-touch quality is hard to maintain.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=2076.0)
  - [**Proactive Refresh Strategy:** A formal process for refreshing content was identified as a key growth driver. This requires training for MEs/CMs and a clear client narrative on its value.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=2663.0)

## Topics

### EM Pain Points & Training Gaps

  - [**Reporting & Analytics:**](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
      - [**Problem:** Reporting is inconsistent and time-consuming, requiring EMs to "reinvent the structure every time." This makes it hard to tell a clear story of impact.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
      - [**Need:** A standardized framework for different reporting cadences (bi-weekly, monthly, quarterly) that connects signals (e.g., organic traffic) to client goals (e.g., conversions).](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
      - [**Need:** Guidance on setting up analytics (e.g., GA4 events) and asking the right discovery questions to get necessary client-side data.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=3787.0)
  - [**Strategy Sprint Handoff:**](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=2034.0)
      - [**Problem:** The handoff from Strategy Sprint to Phase 2 is a major source of friction.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=2076.0)
      - [**Issues:**](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=2076.0)
          - [**Unclear KPIs:** Goals are often "pie in the sky" (e.g., 3x traffic from zero) and buried in Notion, making them hard to track.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)
          - [**Documentation Gaps:** The client "Operating Manual" is often incomplete, lacking key Fathom call links or specific risks.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=1863.0)
          - [**"Recalibration Period":** The high-touch quality of Sprint is hard to replicate, leading to a period of recalibration where new messaging or product changes can make previously approved content obsolete.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=2528.0)
      - [**Proposed Solution:** A "grading" system for clients exiting Sprint to flag readiness and risks (e.g., slow reviews, competing agencies).](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=2165.0)
  - [**Proactive Content Refresh:**](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=2663.0)
      - [**Problem:** The process for refreshing content is inconsistent, and its value is not always clear to clients.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=2663.0)
      - [**Need:** A formal process for identifying refresh opportunities (e.g., based on performance signals) and integrating them into the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=2820.0)
      - [**Need:** Training for MEs/CMs on refresh tactics and a clear client narrative explaining why refreshing content is a faster path to growth than net-new.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=2960.0)

### New EM Training Platform

  - [Marisol demoed a new training platform designed to address these pain points.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [**Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
      - [**Foundational Modules:** Core company principles (e.g., Growth Engine model, talk tracks, objection handling).](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
      - [**Master Documents:** Practical guides for specific jobs-to-be-done.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
          - [`Week-by-Week Guide`: Maps modules to weekly tasks for sprint EMs.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
          - [`Meeting-First Guide`: Provides checklists and scripts for key meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
          - [`Sprint Track Map`: A master document mapping all jobs-to-be-done to relevant modules.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [**Navigation:** The platform is designed for on-demand learning, not linear consumption. A "jobs-to-be-done" database is in development to improve searchability.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marisol & Kyle:** Prioritize building playbooks for the top requests:](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=3668.0)
      - [Standardized reporting framework.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=3690.0)
      - [Proactive content refresh process (including ME/CM training).](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=2960.0)
      - [Guidance on client analytics discovery and setup.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=3787.0)
  - [**Jo:** Share call recordings demonstrating strategy refresh conversations with Marisol to use as training examples.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
  - [**Ella:** Schedule recurring (bi-weekly/monthly) workshopping sessions to review playbooks and discuss real-world scenarios.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=3869.0)
  - [**Sprint Team:** Refine the handoff process to ensure clients graduate with:](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
      - [Clearly defined, feasible KPIs.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)
      - [Instrumented tracking and client buy-in.](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
      - [Documented risks and a "readiness grade."](https://fathom.video/share/p1jVmT1nE41Q4s7sY4Wh9tD-ckpJ3X9d?tab=summary&timestamp=2165.0)

action_items.description: Share milestone-related client call recordings; tag Marisol
Schedule biweekly EM conversion workshops w/ Kyle; request real-life scenarios from EMs
